task.prompt: Write a function `pick_primary_contact(contacts)` that chooses the primary contact from a list.

gold_spec.goal: Choose one primary contact email from contact records using deterministic business rules.

inputs.name: contacts
inputs.description: contact records with email, verified, priority, and updated_at fields

outputs.name: email
outputs.description: selected contact email, or None when no eligible contact exists

postconditions: Eligible contacts must have a truthy string email and verified is exactly True.
Ignore contacts missing email or with verified not exactly True.
When priority ties, prefer the contact with the greatest updated_at value.
When both priority and updated_at tie, prefer the earliest contact in input order.
Return only the selected email string, not the whole contact.
edge_cases: If no eligible contact exists, return None.
Unverified contacts never win, even with better priority.
acceptance_criteria: Selection is deterministic for every input order.

known_weakness.description: The raw prompt leaves eligibility, priority direction, tie-breaking, and return shape unspecified.
